reason: Reviewer Agent score: plausibility 0.85 · evidence 0.55 · scope 0.60 · duplicate-risk 0.50. Well-supported claim that tau burden tracks cognitive decline more tightly than amyloid; evidence is a single paraphrased note line. Concerns: Single evidence span paraphrases rather than quotes a primary source; No effect size, cohort, or imaging modality specified; Likely overlaps with proposal vpr_3631e2efc094301d.
